plate_additions: Keep the exact composition (warm god-rays through dense canopy, winding dirt path forking toward camera, fork sign-post mid-frame). FLATTEN/REMOVE the big foreground occluders so they can become separate props: erase the giant left-edge mossy trunk, the giant right-edge mossy trunk, and the big mossy fallen LOG on the right — paint clean walkable forest floor and continuous undergrowth where they were so the floor reads open. Push the remaining trees deeper and dimmer (atmospheric haze). Add richer surreal LucasArts detail: an extra carved heart 'א.ק. אהב את כ.ק.' faintly on a mid trunk, more layered fern/leaf clutter, a few extra red-cap toadstools tucked in the undergrowth, dust motes in the light shafts, and one tiny gag — a pair of glowing eyes peeking from a dark gap between two far trunks.

props.name: big_tree_left
props.prompt: Paint ONLY one giant gnarled forest tree trunk for the LEFT foreground edge, in the game's hand-painted LucasArts style. Tall thick mossy bark trunk rising from floor to top of frame, twisted with knots and a low fork, patches of green moss and lichen, a couple of red-cap mushrooms clinging at its base. Warm side-light from the central god-rays on its right face, deep shadow on its left. Standalone transparent element on solid #00FF00, feet anchored at bottom.

props.name: big_tree_right
props.prompt: Paint ONLY one giant gnarled forest tree trunk for the RIGHT foreground edge, in the game's hand-painted LucasArts style. Massive mossy bark trunk floor-to-ceiling, twisted grain, a faint carved heart 'א.ק.' scar on the bark as a gag, lichen blotches, slightly thicker than the left tree to read as nearest. Warm rim-light on its left face from the god-rays, cool shadow on the right. Standalone transparent element on solid #00FF00, feet anchored at bottom.

props.name: mossy_log
props.prompt: Paint ONLY a fat fallen forest log lying horizontally, in the game's hand-painted LucasArts style. Thick mossy bark log with two cut ends showing concentric growth rings, soft moss and a few tiny toadstools on top, the seat where a character sits. Warm dappled light from above-left, shadow underneath grounding it to the dirt. Standalone transparent element on solid #00FF00, bottom edge meeting the floor.

props.name: fork_signpost
props.prompt: Paint ONLY a small weathered wooden trail signpost for mid-frame, in the game's hand-painted LucasArts style. A short post in the dirt with a single board sign nailed on, a hand-painted arrow on the board pointing UP the path, a little moss and a curled leaf on top. Warm forest light, soft cast shadow at its base. Standalone transparent element on solid #00FF00, post bottom anchored to floor.

ambient.what: god-rays / light shafts shimmer through the canopy
ambient.where: x:60-260, y:40-150 (the three slanted light cones in the center)
ambient.notes: slow alpha breathe 0.08->0.16; tie to dust motes drifting downward inside the cones

ambient.where: top leaf-mass y:40-110 across full width
ambient.notes: gentle ±1-2deg rotation so the leaf ceiling feels alive; phase-offset per blob
small looping translate with wraparound; warm yellow/gold; subtle pulse on alpha for blink

ambient.where: dark gap between two far trunks ~x:130,y:95
ambient.notes: 2-frame open/blink loop at ~1.5fps for a surreal LucasArts scare-gag

bizarre: 1) The fork signpost's painted arrow occasionally re-points itself a few degrees (sway) as if undecided. 2) A pair of glowing eyes blinks from the dark gap between far trunks, never approaching. 3) The carved 'א.ק. אהב את כ.ק.' heart on the right trunk has a tiny fresh-painted 'תיקון: כ.ק. לא ידעה' scratched beneath it. 4) One red toadstool in the undergrowth is faintly breathing (pulse) like it's alive and watching.
walk_notes: Walkbox unchanged: keep {x:10,y:160,w:300,h:34} (floor lower third). Depth ramp now nearScale 1.15 at y=194, farScale 0.7 at horizon y=150. Foreground occluders sit just below/at the floor line: big_tree_left baseline 168 and big_tree_right baseline 166 let the player pass BEHIND them near the left/right exits; mossy_log baseline 150 means the player draws in front of the log when standing at the wolf's near-point (y:170) and behind it when further back. fork_signpost baseline 146 is above the walk area so the player always passes in front of it — it stays decorative midground.
